name: AI Web Research Agent powered by Bright Data

values.formSubmittedText: Research in progress! Your structured report will land in your Slack channel within 2-5 minutes. Powered by Bright Data + Claude.

values.placeholder: e.g., Latest developments in autonomous AI agents in 2026
e.g., technical founders, CMO, VC analysts

parameters.formDescription: Give the agent a research goal. It will browse the web via Bright Data and deliver a structured report to Slack.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert AI research agent. Your job is to investigate a topic deeply using web search and deliver a clear, structured report formatted for Slack.

## Research process
1. Start with a Google search: call the web_unlocker tool with a URL like `https://www.google.com/search?q=YOUR+QUERY`
2. From the search results, identify the 3-5 most relevant and authoritative sources
3. Fetch each source by calling web_unlocker with its URL
4. Synthesize the findings

## Report format (Slack mrkdwn)
Return ONLY the Slack-formatted report, no preamble:

*🔍 Research Report: <topic>*
_Audience: <audience>_

*TL;DR*
• 3-4 bullet points with the core takeaways

*Key findings*
1. <finding 1 with short explanation>
2. <finding 2 with short explanation>
3. <finding 3 with short explanation>

*Sources*
• <url 1>
• <url 2>
• <url 3>

*Recommended next step*
_<one actionable recommendation tailored to the audience>_

## Rules
- Always cite sources (URLs)
- Use Slack mrkdwn (*bold*, _italic_), never markdown ** or __
- Keep it concise and scannable
- If a source fails to load, skip it and try another

parameters.toolDescription: Fetch full content of any URL as clean Markdown. Handles JS-rendered pages, CAPTCHAs, anti-bot. Use for Google search URLs (https://www.google.com/search?q=QUERY) and individual source pages discovered from those searches.

parameters.content:
## 🔍 AI Web Research Agent powered by Bright Data

An autonomous research agent that browses the web for you. Fill a form, get a structured report in Slack within 2-5 minutes.

### How it works
1. **Form** collects a research goal and target audience
2. **AI Agent** (Claude Opus 4.7) plans the research
3. **Bright Data Web Unlocker** scrapes Google + source pages (handles JS, CAPTCHAs, anti-bot)
4. The agent synthesizes a structured Slack-ready report
5. **Slack** delivers the report to your team

### Why Bright Data?
- Bypasses CAPTCHAs, bot detection and geo-blocks
- Renders JavaScript-heavy pages
- Returns clean Markdown ready for LLM consumption

### Prerequisites
- A [Bright Data](https://brightdata.com) account with a **Web Unlocker** zone (`web_unlocker_agent`)
- An [Anthropic](https://anthropic.com) API key (Claude Opus 4.7 or any Claude model)
- A [Slack](https://slack.com) workspace with a channel for reports

### 🔄 Customizable
- Swap **Claude** for OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, Groq…
- Swap **Slack** for Discord, Teams, Telegram, email, Notion, a CRM…
- Replace the **Form Trigger** with a webhook, schedule, chat trigger…

### Setup
1. Connect your **Bright Data**, **Anthropic** and **Slack** credentials
2. Select your Slack **channel** in the last node
3. Activate the workflow and open the form URL

## 1️⃣ Trigger (Form)
Exposes a public form where users enter:
- **Research goal** — what to investigate
- **Target audience** — who the report is for

### 🔄 You can replace this trigger with anything!
- **Webhook** (trigger from any external app)
- **Chat Trigger** (talk to the agent)
- **Schedule** (run every day/week)
- **Slack / Discord slash command**
- **Email trigger**
- **Airtable / Notion / HubSpot trigger**

Just make sure the output includes the two fields used below: `Research goal` and `Target audience`.

## 2️⃣ AI Research Agent
The brain of the workflow. Plans the research, calls the Bright Data tool multiple times (Google search → source pages), then synthesizes a structured Slack report.

Full system prompt is defined in the node — feel free to tweak the report format.

## 3️⃣ Claude Opus 4.7
The LLM behind the agent.

🔄 Swap for any chat model: **OpenAI GPT-5**, **Gemini**, **Mistral**, **Groq**, **Ollama**…

## 4️⃣ Bright Data Web Unlocker
The agent's eyes on the web.

Fetches any URL as clean Markdown:
- Handles **JavaScript** rendering
- Bypasses **CAPTCHAs** and bot detection
- Works on **geo-blocked** content

Used by the agent to search Google and read source pages.

## 5️⃣ Output (Slack)
Posts the structured report in your chosen Slack channel (Slack mrkdwn formatting).

### 🔄 You can replace Slack with anything!
- **Email** (Gmail, Outlook, SMTP)
- **Discord / Microsoft Teams / Telegram**
- **Notion / Google Docs / Confluence**
- **Airtable / HubSpot / Salesforce** (save as record)
- **Google Sheets** (append as row)
- **SMS / WhatsApp**
- **Respond to Webhook** (send back to the caller)

The agent's report is available in `{{ $json.output }}` — plug it into any destination.
